description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sonarcloud scan that runs on push to master and dev branches and on pull request open, synchronize, and reopen events. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up JDK 11, downloads and sets up sonar-scanner and build-wrapper, prepares a cfamily cache timestamp, and then installs dependencies, configures, builds with build-wrapper, and runs sonar-scanner with secrets GITHUB_TOKEN and SONAR_TOKEN.
